instructions: These are the human verdicts for each call. Do NOT look at this file before completing your submission. Check your accuracy against these after you're done.

call_01.reason: Clean flow through all 4 phases. Agent is empathetic, explains the offer well, and secures a payment commitment.

call_02.reason: Disposition says BLANK_CALL but there's a full 154-line conversation. Agent fails to switch language promptly, and the disposition is completely wrong.

call_03.reason: 15-minute call with excessive repetition. Customer gets increasingly frustrated as agent can't resolve the already-paid claim. Agent loops instead of escalating.

call_04.reason: Agent handles unemployed borrower with empathy, doesn't pressure, schedules callback appropriately.

call_05.reason: Agent navigates amount discrepancy well, customer agrees to a payment plan. Clean resolution.

call_06.reason: Short, professional dispute handling. Agent doesn't argue, offers email escalation path.

call_07.reason: Language barrier not handled well. Agent attempts Tamil but the conversation goes nowhere. No fallback strategy.

call_08.reason: Wrong number correctly identified and call ended quickly. No information leaked.

call_09.reason: Inbound callback but agent doesn't adapt to the context. Connection drops and no recovery attempted.

call_10.reason: Extremely short call. Agent doesn't dig into why the customer is evasive. Gives up too quickly without exploring options.
